"'''Stormie'''" was a [[stormtrooper]] [[doll]] owned by [[Jyn Erso]] on the [[planet]] [[Lah'mu]].<ref name="ROUVG" /> It had 13 points of articulation and was made out of wood.<ref name="100objects">''[[Star Wars 100 Objects]]''</ref>

In [[13 BBY]],<ref name="ROUVG" /> [[Galen Walton Erso|Galen Erso]] was [[Capture of Galen Erso|captured]] by [[Director]] [[Orson Callan Krennic|Orson Krennic]], and while his [[death trooper]]s searched for his daughter, Jyn, they found "Stormie" lying on the ground.<ref name="Rogue One">''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''</ref>

{{Stub}}
